# Security Policy

## Supported Project

Security checks currently focus on:

- `ai-appointment-system`
- GitHub Actions workflows
- Python dependencies

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Open a private security advisory on GitHub if available, or create an issue without exposing secrets or private credentials.

Do not paste real API keys, patient data, access tokens, or production database contents into issues, pull requests, commits, or CI logs.

## Automated Security

This repository uses:

- Dependabot dependency updates
- GitHub Actions dependency review
- CodeQL static analysis
- Secret scanning when enabled in repository settings
